name: PanelLayerDefinition
description: Creates panel-free Layer definitions for exterior, core, and interior layers. Pass the output to CT_Panel's 'layers' input.

inputParameters.name: exterior_thickness
inputParameters.description: Thickness of the exterior layer. Omit to create a two-layer (core + interior) structure.

inputParameters.name: core_thickness
inputParameters.description: Thickness of the core layer. Leave empty (None) to let it absorb remaining panel thickness.

inputParameters.name: interior_thickness
inputParameters.description: Thickness of the interior layer. Omit to create a two-layer (exterior + core) structure.

inputParameters.name: exterior_name
inputParameters.description: (Optional) Name for the exterior layer. Defaults to 'exterior'.

inputParameters.name: core_name
inputParameters.description: (Optional) Name for the core layer. Defaults to 'core'.

inputParameters.name: interior_name
inputParameters.description: (Optional) Name for the interior layer. Defaults to 'interior'.

outputParameters.name: layer_structure
outputParameters.description: LayerStructure definition with exterior, core, and interior sublayers. Connect to CT_Panel's 'layer_structure' input or CT_Subdivide_Layer's 'layer_structure' input.
